title: Assist with propagation of medicinal cannabis
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist with propagation of medicinal cannabis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for medicinal cannabis propagation tasks

pcs.text: Identify and confirm propagation tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm propagation tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm propagation tasks, workplace procedures and specifications with supervisor.

pcs.text: Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise health and safety hazards, and report safety concerns.

pcs.text: Collect required tools, equipment and materials for the task, and check for approval and functionality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect required tools, equipment and materials for the task, and check for approval and functionality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect required tools, equipment and materials for the task, and check for approval and functionality.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to health and safety and hygiene requirements.

pcs.text: Apply personal hygiene and tools and equipment sanitation procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply personal hygiene and tools and equipment sanitation procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply personal hygiene and tools and equipment sanitation procedures.

pcs.text: Check propagation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check propagation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check propagation work area is clean and free of waste on entering secured area.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for medicinal cannabis propagation tasks

elements.title: Assist with propagation of plant material

pcs.text: Identify propagation material to be used, and confirm quantity and/or weights with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify propagation material to be used, and confirm quantity and/or weights with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify propagation material to be used, and confirm quantity and/or weights with supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare media for the propagation process being undertaken according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare media for the propagation process being undertaken according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare media for the propagation process being undertaken according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Assist with taking cuttings from mother plant, sowing seed or preparing tissue culture as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with taking cuttings from mother plant, sowing seed or preparing tissue culture as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with taking cuttings from mother plant, sowing seed or preparing tissue culture as required.

pcs.text: Place cuttings, seed or tissue into prepared media to required level as directed by supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place cuttings, seed or tissue into prepared media to required level as directed by supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place cuttings, seed or tissue into prepared media to required level as directed by supervisor.

pcs.text: Assist with labelling propagation material according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with labelling propagation material according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with labelling propagation material according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Place media in propagation growing system using safe practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place media in propagation growing system using safe practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place media in propagation growing system using safe practices.

pcs.text: Assist with water and nutrient requirements according to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with water and nutrient requirements according to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with water and nutrient requirements according to specifications.

pcs.text: Assist with temperature, lighting, carbon dioxide and humidity requirements according to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with temperature, lighting, carbon dioxide and humidity requirements according to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with temperature, lighting, carbon dioxide and humidity requirements according to specifications.

pcs.text: Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record required data according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights.

elements.title: Assist with monitoring propagation material health and environmental climate conditions

pcs.text: Confirm quantity and weights of propagation material to be monitored with supervisor

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm quantity and weights of propagation material to be monitored with supervisor.

pcs.text: Assist with monitoring health of propagation material according to monitoring schedule, and report abnormalities

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with monitoring health of propagation material according to monitoring schedule, and report abnormalities.

pcs.text: Check for signs of disease or pests, and report presence or potential of disease or pests

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for signs of disease or pests, and report presence or potential of disease or pests.

pcs.text: Assist with monitoring water and nutrient requirements, applying re-wetting techniques as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with monitoring water and nutrient requirements, applying re-wetting techniques as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with monitoring water and nutrient requirements, applying re-wetting techniques as required.

pcs.text: Assist with monitoring climate control levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist with monitoring climate control levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist with monitoring climate control levels according to specifications, and report levels that are out of acceptable range.

pcs.text: Keep propagation growing system clean and free from propagation material waste at all times
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep propagation growing system clean and free from propagation material waste at all times?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep propagation growing system clean and free from propagation material waste at all times.

pcs.text: Maintain records according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records according to workplace quality procedures, reporting any deviations from quantity and weights.
